{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0162ZjQq2b349CGANNmK51wj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Product Requirements Document\n     2→\n     3→## Project Name\n     4→\n     5→Bookmate\n     6→\n     7→## Overview\n     8→\n     9→Bookmate is a web service that helps fiction readers find companions for reading and discussing books together. Users post listings for books they want to read, others join, and once a group forms, they connect via Telegram to coordinate their reading sessions. Think of it as matchmaking for book clubs.\n    10→\n    11→**Target audience:** English-speaking fiction readers who want structured reading companionship but struggle to find like-minded partners.\n    12→\n    13→## Goals\n    14→\n    15→- Make it effortless to find people who want to read the same book at the same pace\n    16→- Remove the friction of organizing a reading group — from discovery to first meeting\n    17→- Keep the platform lightweight: match readers, hand off to Telegram for discussion\n    18→\n    19→## P0 — Must Have (Core, launch blocker)\n    20→\n    21→### User Authentication\n    22→\n    23→Email + password registration and login. Required to post or join any listing.\n    24→\n    25→### Create a Reading Listing\n    26→\n    27→A user creates a listing with:\n    28→- **Book** — selected via Open Library API (title, author, cover art auto-populated)\n    29→- **Preferred language** — language for discussion\n    30→- **Reading pace** — e.g., \"1 chapter per week\", \"50 pages per day\"\n    31→- **Start date** — when the group begins reading\n    32→- **Meeting format** — voice calls, text chat, or mixed\n    33→- **Max group size** — author sets the cap (e.g., 3–6 people)\n    34→\n    35→### Browse Listings\n    36→\n    37→Simple chronological list of open listings. No search or filters at this stage — just a scrollable feed of available reading groups to join.\n    38→\n    39→### Join a Listing\n    40→\n    41→Any authenticated user can join an open listing. First-come-first-served, no approval step. A user can be part of multiple reading groups simultaneously.\n    42→\n    43→### Group Formation\n    44→\n    45→When a listing reaches its max group size:\n    46→- The listing becomes invisible to non-participants (effectively closed)\n    47→- The author is prompted to share a Telegram group link with participants\n    48→- The author manually creates the Telegram group and pastes the invite link\n    49→\n    50→### Notifications\n    51→\n    52→Email + in-app notifications for:\n    53→- **Each new sign-up** — listing author is notified when someone joins\n    54→- **Group full** — all participants are notified when the group reaches its cap\n    55→\n    56→### User Profile (Basic)\n    57→\n    58→- Display name\n    59→- Short bio\n    60→\n    61→## P1 — Should Have (Important, not launch blocker)\n    62→\n    63→### Search and Filters\n    64→\n    65→- Search listings by book title or author\n    66→- Filter by reading pace, start date, meeting format\n    67→- Browsable feed with sorting options\n    68→\n    69→### Telegram Group Creation Assistance\n    70→\n    71→Provide guidance or tooling to help the listing author create and share the Telegram group link more easily (e.g., step-by-step instructions, link validation).\n    72→\n    73→### Extended User Profile\n    74→\n    75→- Reading history (past groups participated in)\n    76→- \"Currently reading\" list\n    77→- Favorite genres\n    78→\n    79→## P2 — Nice to Have (Bonus, if time permits)\n    80→\n    81→### Automatic Telegram Group Creation\n    82→\n    83→System auto-creates a Telegram group via API and shares the invite link with all participants — no manual step needed.\n    84→\n    85→### Applicant Approval System\n    86→\n    87→Listing author can review and approve/reject users who want to join, instead of first-come-first-served.\n    88→\n    89→### Rating and Reputation System\n    90→\n    91→Users can rate their reading group experience. Build a reputation score based on participation history and peer ratings.\n    92→\n    93→### Discord Support\n    94→\n    95→Allow group creation via Discord as an alternative to Telegram.\n    96→\n    97→## Non-Goals\n    98→\n    99→- No payment or monetization features\n   100→- No mobile app (web only)\n   101→- No real-time chat within the platform (groups communicate via Telegram)\n   102→- No complex third-party integrations beyond Open Library API\n   103→- No AI-powered recommendations or matching (AI is allowed where it genuinely improves UX)\n   104→- No content hosting (e-books, PDFs, etc.)\n   105→\n   106→## Tech Stack\n   107→\n   108→- **Frontend + Backend:** Next.js (full-stack)\n   109→- **Database:** SQLite (local, persistent across container restarts)\n   110→- **Analytics:** SQLite-based (no third-party analytics)\n   111→- **Deployment:** Docker container with mounted volume for SQLite persistence\n   112→- **Book data:** Open Library API (free, no API key required)\n   113→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"c792cb54-90aa-431c-912e-de72243aeefb","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:00:08.789Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/PRD.md","content":"# Product Requirements Document\n\n## Project Name\n\nBookmate\n\n## Overview\n\nBookmate is a web service that helps fiction readers find companions for reading and discussing books together. Users post listings for books they want to read, others join, and once a group forms, they connect via Telegram to coordinate their reading sessions. Think of it as matchmaking for book clubs.\n\n**Target audience:** English-speaking fiction readers who want structured reading companionship but struggle to find like-minded partners.\n\n## Goals\n\n- Make it effortless to find people who want to read the same book at the same pace\n- Remove the friction of organizing a reading group — from discovery to first meeting\n- Keep the platform lightweight: match readers, hand off to Telegram for discussion\n\n## P0 — Must Have (Core, launch blocker)\n\n### User Authentication\n\nEmail + password registration and login. Required to post or join any listing.\n\n### Create a Reading Listing\n\nA user creates a listing with:\n- **Book** — selected via Open Library API (title, author, cover art auto-populated)\n- **Preferred language** — language for discussion\n- **Reading pace** — e.g., \"1 chapter per week\", \"50 pages per day\"\n- **Start date** — when the group begins reading\n- **Meeting format** — voice calls, text chat, or mixed\n- **Max group size** — author sets the cap (e.g., 3–6 people)\n\n### Browse Listings\n\nSimple chronological list of open listings. No search or filters at this stage — just a scrollable feed of available reading groups to join.\n\n### Join a Listing\n\nAny authenticated user can join an open listing. First-come-first-served, no approval step. A user can be part of multiple reading groups simultaneously.\n\n### Group Formation\n\nWhen a listing reaches its max group size:\n- The listing becomes invisible to non-participants (effectively closed)\n- The author is prompted to share a Telegram group link with participants\n- The author manually creates the Telegram group and pastes the invite link\n\n### Notifications\n\nEmail + in-app notifications for:\n- **Each new sign-up** — listing author is notified when someone joins\n- **Group full** — all participants are notified when the group reaches its cap\n\n### User Profile (Basic)\n\n- Display name\n- Short bio\n\n## P1 — Should Have (Important, not launch blocker)\n\n### Search and Filters\n\n- Search listings by book title or author\n- Filter by reading pace, start date, meeting format\n- Browsable feed with sorting options\n\n### Telegram Group Creation Assistance\n\nProvide guidance or tooling to help the listing author create and share the Telegram group link more easily (e.g., step-by-step instructions, link validation).\n\n### Extended User Profile\n\n- Reading history (past groups participated in)\n- \"Currently reading\" list\n- Favorite genres\n\n## P2 — Nice to Have (Bonus, if time permits)\n\n### Automatic Telegram Group Creation\n\nSystem auto-creates a Telegram group via API and shares the invite link with all participants — no manual step needed.\n\n### Applicant Approval System\n\nListing author can review and approve/reject users who want to join, instead of first-come-first-served.\n\n### Rating and Reputation System\n\nUsers can rate their reading group experience. Build a reputation score based on participation history and peer ratings.\n\n### Discord Support\n\nAllow group creation via Discord as an alternative to Telegram.\n\n## Non-Goals\n\n- No payment or monetization features\n- No mobile app (web only)\n- No real-time chat within the platform (groups communicate via Telegram)\n- No complex third-party integrations beyond Open Library API\n- No AI-powered recommendations or matching (AI is allowed where it genuinely improves UX)\n- No content hosting (e-books, PDFs, etc.)\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n- **Frontend + Backend:** Next.js (full-stack)\n- **Database:** SQLite (local, persistent across container restarts)\n- **Analytics:** SQLite-based (no third-party analytics)\n- **Deployment:** Docker container with mounted volume for SQLite persistence\n- **Book data:** Open Library API (free, no API key required)\n","numLines":113,"startLine":1,"totalLines":113}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Nu5d9dq7QVeodxdxY2XoXm","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Learned Patterns\n     2→\n     3→## GitHub Authentication\n     4→- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n     5→  ```bash\n     6→  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n     7→  ```\n     8→- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n     9→- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n    10→\n    11→## Session Flow\n    12→- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n    13→- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n    14→- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n    15→\n    16→## Environment\n    17→- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n    18→- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n    19→- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n    20→- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n    21→- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n    22→- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n    23→\n    24→## Build\n    25→- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n    26→- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n    27→- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n    28→- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n    29→- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n    30→\n    31→## Browser Testing\n    32→- agent-browser crashes consistently in this container environment (\"Page crashed\")\n    33→- Workaround: use `curl` to verify HTML output and API responses\n    34→- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n    35→\n    36→## Working Directory\n    37→- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n    38→- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n    39→- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n    40→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"7f71ba17-331b-469e-9192-0781b179d523","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:00:09.245Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/patterns.md","content":"# Learned Patterns\n\n## GitHub Authentication\n- Always export GH_TOKEN from .env before running gh commands:\n  ```bash\n  export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2)\n  ```\n- Cannot `--add-reviewer` when token owner is the PR author (HTTP 422)\n- Repo created under TommyBrennan (not XanderZhu — can't create for other users)\n\n## Session Flow\n- First session bootstraps repo, creates issues from PRD as `approved` + `prd`\n- PRD features are pre-approved — no proposal step needed\n- Focus on housekeeping when blocked: organize project board, update memory\n\n## Environment\n- Find agent-browser with: `which agent-browser`\n- agent-browser requires `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp` prefix due to socket dir permissions\n- Playwright chromium needs manual install: `npx playwright install chromium`\n- Git remote uses PAT in URL: `https://ghp_...@github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate.git`\n- Git remote URL may lose PAT between sessions — re-set with `git remote set-url`\n- Must set `git config user.email` and `user.name` each session if not set globally\n\n## Build\n- Next.js 16 Turbopack fails in this environment (can't read /root dir)\n- Use Next.js 15 which defaults to webpack\n- Build from app/ directory: `cd app && npx next build`\n- `useRef<T>()` needs explicit `undefined` arg in React 19: `useRef<T>(undefined)`\n- better-sqlite3 `.all()` returns `unknown[]` — cast explicitly for TS\n\n## Browser Testing\n- agent-browser crashes consistently in this container environment (\"Page crashed\")\n- Workaround: use `curl` to verify HTML output and API responses\n- For API testing: `curl -s URL | python3 -m json.tool`\n\n## Working Directory\n- Project root: /root/Projects/bookmate\n- App directory: /root/Projects/bookmate/app\n- Always use full paths for .claude-beat/.env references\n","numLines":40,"startLine":1,"totalLines":40}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011p9kVn1EbCHSUjdmNkLP9m","type":"tool_result","content":"{\n    \"body\": \"## Summary\\n\\nCloses three PRD gaps found during gap analysis:\\n\\n- **Email notifications (P0, #26):** Added `nodemailer`-based SMTP email sending alongside existing in-app notifications. All notification types (`new_member`, `group_full`, `application_received/approved/rejected`, `rating_received`) now also send an email when SMTP is configured. Email sending is fire-and-forget \\u2014 failures don't block the notification flow.\\n\\n- **Full listing visibility (P0, #27):** Full listings are now truly invisible to non-members. The `/api/listings/[id]` endpoint returns 404 for non-members when `is_full = 1`. The detail page shows a \\\"no longer available\\\" message with a link back to browse.\\n\\n- **Missing browse filters (P1, #28):** Added reading pace dropdown and start date picker to the filter panel on the browse page. The API now supports `start_date_from` parameter for date filtering. Pace filter was already in API but had no UI.\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Verify full listings return 404 from `/api/listings/:id` for non-members\\n- [ ] Verify full listings still accessible to members and author\\n- [ ] Verify browse page shows reading pace and start date filter controls\\n- [ ] Verify filters correctly narrow listing results\\n- [ ] Verify email sending works when SMTP env vars configured (optional \\u2014 gracefully skipped when unconfigured)\\n- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)\\n\\nCloses #26, closes #27, closes #28\\n\\n\\ud83e\\udd16 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\",\n    \"comments\": [],\n    \"mergeable\": \"MERGEABLE\",\n    \"reviews\": [],\n    \"state\": \"OPEN\",\n    \"statusCheckRollup\": [],\n    \"title\": \"fix: close PRD gaps \\u2014 email, visibility, filters\"\n}","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"06ec05b5-592c-4832-b804-92f6cd52b21c","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:00:21.814Z","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"{\n    \"body\": \"## Summary\\n\\nCloses three PRD gaps found during gap analysis:\\n\\n- **Email notifications (P0, #26):** Added `nodemailer`-based SMTP email sending alongside existing in-app notifications. All notification types (`new_member`, `group_full`, `application_received/approved/rejected`, `rating_received`) now also send an email when SMTP is configured. Email sending is fire-and-forget \\u2014 failures don't block the notification flow.\\n\\n- **Full listing visibility (P0, #27):** Full listings are now truly invisible to non-members. The `/api/listings/[id]` endpoint returns 404 for non-members when `is_full = 1`. The detail page shows a \\\"no longer available\\\" message with a link back to browse.\\n\\n- **Missing browse filters (P1, #28):** Added reading pace dropdown and start date picker to the filter panel on the browse page. The API now supports `start_date_from` parameter for date filtering. Pace filter was already in API but had no UI.\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Verify full listings return 404 from `/api/listings/:id` for non-members\\n- [ ] Verify full listings still accessible to members and author\\n- [ ] Verify browse page shows reading pace and start date filter controls\\n- [ ] Verify filters correctly narrow listing results\\n- [ ] Verify email sending works when SMTP env vars configured (optional \\u2014 gracefully skipped when unconfigured)\\n- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)\\n\\nCloses #26, closes #27, closes #28\\n\\n\\ud83e\\udd16 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\",\n    \"comments\": [],\n    \"mergeable\": \"MERGEABLE\",\n    \"reviews\": [],\n    \"state\": \"OPEN\",\n    \"statusCheckRollup\": [],\n    \"title\": \"fix: close PRD gaps \\u2014 email, visibility, filters\"\n}","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Nzb1XCrxBsHrhbBBP1QcSY","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Session Log — 2026-03-20 10:00 UTC\n     2→\n     3→## Duration\n     4→~12 minutes\n     5→\n     6→## Review Findings\n     7→- PR #25 (Docker deployment) open, mergeable, no objections, 1 session elapsed — ready to merge\n     8→- Issue #21 (Telegram bot token) still needs-human, no new response\n     9→- No new relevant emails for Bookmate\n    10→- All PRD features marked as implemented, but gap analysis revealed 3 incomplete areas\n    11→\n    12→## Actions Taken\n    13→\n    14→### 1. Merged PR #25 — Docker Deployment\n    15→- Merged into main, branch deleted\n    16→- Issue #24 auto-closed\n    17→\n    18→### 2. PRD Gap Analysis\n    19→Ran thorough analysis comparing PRD requirements to actual implementation. Found 3 gaps:\n    20→\n    21→1. **Email notifications (P0)** — PRD requires \"email + in-app notifications\" but no email sending code existed\n    22→2. **Listing visibility (P0)** — Full listings accessible via direct URL to non-members, leaking Telegram links\n    23→3. **Browse filters (P1)** — Reading pace filter had no UI; start date filter missing from both API and UI\n    24→\n    25→### 3. Created Issues #26, #27, #28\n    26→- All labeled approved, prd, with appropriate priority\n    27→- All added to project board\n    28→\n    29→### 4. Implemented All Three Fixes (PR #30)\n    30→- **Email**: Added nodemailer dependency and lib/email.ts utility. Updated lib/notifications.ts to send emails alongside in-app notifications for all event types. Fire-and-forget pattern.\n    31→- **Visibility**: Added membership check in GET /api/listings/[id] — returns 404 for non-members when listing is full. Added \"not available\" UI state in detail page.\n    32→- **Filters**: Added reading pace dropdown and start date picker to browse filter panel. Added start_date_from API parameter with date validation.\n    33→- Updated .env.example with SMTP configuration section.\n    34→- Build passes, API tested with curl.\n    35→\n    36→### 5. Updated Memory\n    37→\n    38→## Decisions\n    39→- Used nodemailer rather than SaaS email API — keeps project self-contained and free\n    40→- Email sending is fire-and-forget to avoid blocking notification creation\n    41→- Used LIKE matching for reading pace filter since pace is free-text\n    42→- Date filter is one-sided (from date only) — simpler UX than a range picker\n    43→\n    44→## Blockers\n    45→- None\n    46→\n    47→## Next Session\n    48→1. Merge PR #30 if no objections\n    49→2. Check issue #21\n    50→3. Consider CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint\n    51→\n    52→---\n    53→Session ended: Fri Mar 20 10:42:38 AM UTC 2026\n    54→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"16a610e2-eb86-4880-b035-eb816853e539","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:00:51.313Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-20_10-00.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-20 10:00 UTC\n\n## Duration\n~12 minutes\n\n## Review Findings\n- PR #25 (Docker deployment) open, mergeable, no objections, 1 session elapsed — ready to merge\n- Issue #21 (Telegram bot token) still needs-human, no new response\n- No new relevant emails for Bookmate\n- All PRD features marked as implemented, but gap analysis revealed 3 incomplete areas\n\n## Actions Taken\n\n### 1. Merged PR #25 — Docker Deployment\n- Merged into main, branch deleted\n- Issue #24 auto-closed\n\n### 2. PRD Gap Analysis\nRan thorough analysis comparing PRD requirements to actual implementation. Found 3 gaps:\n\n1. **Email notifications (P0)** — PRD requires \"email + in-app notifications\" but no email sending code existed\n2. **Listing visibility (P0)** — Full listings accessible via direct URL to non-members, leaking Telegram links\n3. **Browse filters (P1)** — Reading pace filter had no UI; start date filter missing from both API and UI\n\n### 3. Created Issues #26, #27, #28\n- All labeled approved, prd, with appropriate priority\n- All added to project board\n\n### 4. Implemented All Three Fixes (PR #30)\n- **Email**: Added nodemailer dependency and lib/email.ts utility. Updated lib/notifications.ts to send emails alongside in-app notifications for all event types. Fire-and-forget pattern.\n- **Visibility**: Added membership check in GET /api/listings/[id] — returns 404 for non-members when listing is full. Added \"not available\" UI state in detail page.\n- **Filters**: Added reading pace dropdown and start date picker to browse filter panel. Added start_date_from API parameter with date validation.\n- Updated .env.example with SMTP configuration section.\n- Build passes, API tested with curl.\n\n### 5. Updated Memory\n\n## Decisions\n- Used nodemailer rather than SaaS email API — keeps project self-contained and free\n- Email sending is fire-and-forget to avoid blocking notification creation\n- Used LIKE matching for reading pace filter since pace is free-text\n- Date filter is one-sided (from date only) — simpler UX than a range picker\n\n## Blockers\n- None\n\n## Next Session\n1. Merge PR #30 if no objections\n2. Check issue #21\n3. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01NgYAmWxQ1UPPEWeJtfCsXU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01L2Y6Xau6s6umXXfk8oDpv5","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue list --state all --limit 50 --json number,title,state,labels 2>/dev/null | python3 -c \"\nimport json, sys\nissues = json.load(sys.stdin)\nfor i in issues:\n    labels = ', '.join(l['name'] for l in i['labels'])\n    print(f\\\"#{i['number']} [{i['state']}] {i['title']}  ({labels})\\\")\" ","description":"List all issues with labels"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":346,"cache_read_input_tokens":21860,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":346},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"06659c44-6b0e-4435-865a-6d66ebd7a362"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_016pCGFm5AavpejF7Y3GA5pu","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","name":"Agent","input":{"subagent_type":"feature-dev:code-reviewer","description":"Review codebase for issues","prompt":"Review the Bookmate Next.js application in /root/Projects/bookmate/app for bugs, security issues, and code quality problems. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Xnh2Nx7GzKeBWmUvgz1Egj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\n     2→import path from \"path\";\n     3→import fs from \"fs\";\n     4→\n     5→const DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\n     6→const DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n     7→\n     8→// Ensure data directory exists\n     9→if (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n    10→  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→const db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n    14→\n    15→// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\n    16→db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n    17→db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n    18→\n    19→// Initialize schema\n    20→db.exec(`\n    21→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    22→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    23→    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    24→    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    25→    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    26→    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    27→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    28→  );\n    29→\n    30→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    31→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    32→    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    33→    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    34→    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    35→    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    37→    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    38→    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    39→    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    40→    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    41→    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    42→    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    43→    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    44→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    45→    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    46→  );\n    47→\n    48→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    49→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    50→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    52→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    53→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    54→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    55→  );\n    56→\n    57→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    58→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    59→    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    60→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    61→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    65→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    66→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    67→    listing_id INTEGER,\n    68→    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    69→    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    70→    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    71→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    72→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    73→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    74→  );\n    75→\n    76→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    77→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    78→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    79→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    80→    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n    81→      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    82→    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    83→    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    84→    decided_at TEXT,\n    85→    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    86→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    87→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    88→  );\n    89→`);\n    90→\n    91→// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\n    92→try {\n    93→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n    94→} catch {\n    95→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n    96→}\n    97→\n    98→// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\n    99→try {\n   100→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n   101→} catch {\n   102→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   103→}\n   104→\n   105→// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\n   106→try {\n   107→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   108→} catch {\n   109→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   110→}\n   111→\n   112→// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\n   113→try {\n   114→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   115→} catch {\n   116→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\n   120→try {\n   121→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n   122→} catch {\n   123→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   124→}\n   125→\n   126→// Tables for Telegram bot integration\n   127→db.exec(`\n   128→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n   129→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   130→    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   131→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   132→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n   133→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n   134→  );\n   135→\n   136→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n   137→    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n   138→    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   139→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n   140→  );\n   141→`);\n   142→\n   143→// Rating and Reputation system\n   144→db.exec(`\n   145→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n   146→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n   147→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   148→    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   149→    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   150→    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n   151→    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   152→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   153→    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n   154→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n   155→    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n   156→    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   157→  );\n   158→`);\n   159→\n   160→export default db;\n   161→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"45efcba6-305a-4579-9d89-b0065f4966ed","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:01:52.035Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01V3Vps6DxScWGucjFrGnthj","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\n     2→import { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\n     3→\n     4→export interface SessionData {\n     5→  userId?: number;\n     6→  email?: string;\n     7→  displayName?: string;\n     8→}\n     9→\n    10→const sessionOptions: SessionOptions = {\n    11→  password:\n    12→    process.env.SESSION_SECRET ||\n    13→    \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\",\n    14→  cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n    15→  cookieOptions: {\n    16→    httpOnly: true,\n    17→    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n    18→    sameSite: \"lax\",\n    19→    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n    20→  },\n    21→};\n    22→\n    23→export async function getSession() {\n    24→  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n    25→  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, sessionOptions);\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function requireAuth() {\n    29→  const session = await getSession();\n    30→  if (!session.userId) {\n    31→    return null;\n    32→  }\n    33→  return session;\n    34→}\n    35→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"504470c2-caa3-4f15-8d5d-01cb89321e56","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:01:52.309Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AiUQ8aXMykvWfJgDYiWUjo","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    18→      return NextResponse.json(\n    19→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    20→        { status: 400 }\n    21→      );\n    22→    }\n    23→\n    24→    // Check if email is already taken\n    25→    const existing = db\n    26→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    27→      .get(email);\n    28→    if (existing) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    31→        { status: 409 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    36→\n    37→    const result = db\n    38→      .prepare(\n    39→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    40→      )\n    41→      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    42→\n    43→    // Auto-login after registration\n    44→    const session = await getSession();\n    45→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    46→    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    47→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    48→    await session.save();\n    49→\n    50→    return NextResponse.json(\n    51→      {\n    52→        user: {\n    53→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    54→          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n    55→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    56→        },\n    57→      },\n    58→      { status: 201 }\n    59→    );\n    60→  } catch (error) {\n    61→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    62→    return NextResponse.json(\n    63→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    64→      { status: 500 }\n    65→    );\n    66→  }\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"0a5125f7-0138-4120-bf36-d4185e037c4a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:01:57.088Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PDcgRfQPeDU9kkSA7GrxoC","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    const user = db\n    18→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    19→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    20→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    21→      | undefined;\n    22→\n    23→    if (!user) {\n    24→      return NextResponse.json(\n    25→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    26→        { status: 401 }\n    27→      );\n    28→    }\n    29→\n    30→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    31→    if (!valid) {\n    32→      return NextResponse.json(\n    33→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    34→        { status: 401 }\n    35→      );\n    36→    }\n    37→\n    38→    const session = await getSession();\n    39→    session.userId = user.id;\n    40→    session.email = user.email;\n    41→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    42→    await session.save();\n    43→\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({\n    45→      user: {\n    46→        id: user.id,\n    47→        email: user.email,\n    48→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    49→      },\n    50→    });\n    51→  } catch (error) {\n    52→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    55→      { status: 500 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"0a3b35e7-108b-41d5-8520-2b75d2da2313","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:01:57.874Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PZo5QjWzTLoty2ff3sUEsH","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  try {\n    12→    const body = await req.json();\n    13→    const {\n    14→      bookTitle,\n    15→      bookAuthor,\n    16→      bookCoverUrl,\n    17→      bookOlid,\n    18→      language,\n    19→      readingPace,\n    20→      startDate,\n    21→      meetingFormat,\n    22→      maxGroupSize,\n    23→      requiresApproval,\n    24→      platformPreference,\n    25→    } = body;\n    26→\n    27→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    28→      return NextResponse.json(\n    29→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    30→        { status: 400 }\n    31→      );\n    32→    }\n    33→\n    34→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    35→      return NextResponse.json(\n    36→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    37→        { status: 400 }\n    38→      );\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    42→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    43→      return NextResponse.json(\n    44→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    45→        { status: 400 }\n    46→      );\n    47→    }\n    48→\n    49→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n    50→      ? platformPreference\n    51→      : \"telegram\";\n    52→\n    53→    const result = db\n    54→      .prepare(\n    55→        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n    56→         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n    57→      )\n    58→      .run(\n    59→        session.userId,\n    60→        bookTitle.trim(),\n    61→        bookAuthor.trim(),\n    62→        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n    63→        bookOlid || \"\",\n    64→        language || \"English\",\n    65→        readingPace.trim(),\n    66→        startDate,\n    67→        meetingFormat,\n    68→        size,\n    69→        requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n    70→        platform\n    71→      );\n    72→\n    73→    // Auto-join the author as a member\n    74→    db.prepare(\n    75→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    76→    ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n    77→\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { id: result.lastInsertRowid },\n    80→      { status: 201 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  } catch (error) {\n    83→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    86→      { status: 500 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"c3d322c0-db95-42ba-902a-afc549c6930f","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:01:58.808Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a6c6355156d4cb6f6","tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":13737,"tool_uses":8,"duration_ms":16229},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"cc6de45e-94dc-4fb2-b059-36b53f4b0a6f","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_017CATWGJcnih4CVrSbSDLHd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JRuEbWVi9y77GFtZ8zQpLL","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2666,"cache_read_input_tokens":10931,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2666,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"9721d2ce-3458-48bf-948e-2ff5679611f5"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JRuEbWVi9y77GFtZ8zQpLL","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    20→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    21→\n    22→  if (!listing) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    29→      { status: 400 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  // Check if already a member\n    38→  const existing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\n    40→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    41→    )\n    42→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    43→\n    44→  if (existing) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→  }\n    47→\n    48→  // Count current members\n    49→  const { count } = db\n    50→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    51→    .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    52→\n    53→  if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  // Join\n    58→  db.prepare(\n    59→    \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    60→  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    61→\n    62→  // Notify the author\n    63→  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    64→\n    65→  // Check if group is now full\n    66→  const newCount = count + 1;\n    67→  if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→    db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    69→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: newCount });\n    73→}\n    74→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"88441f97-0b10-4f4e-ae50-7f57449d0079","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:01.877Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a6c6355156d4cb6f6","tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":13762,"tool_uses":9,"duration_ms":16689},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"8cb47849-241c-4347-80f3-f79e90ce211f","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_017CATWGJcnih4CVrSbSDLHd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JCMnKwGPfX8ym9HxVDoqBQ","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2666,"cache_read_input_tokens":10931,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2666,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"8b3156fc-ba10-4308-b027-8a1732327c27"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JCMnKwGPfX8ym9HxVDoqBQ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET(\n     8→  _req: NextRequest,\n     9→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    10→) {\n    11→  const { id } = await params;\n    12→\n    13→  const listing = db\n    14→    .prepare(\n    15→      `SELECT\n    16→        l.*,\n    17→        u.display_name as author_name\n    18→      FROM listings l\n    19→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    20→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    21→    )\n    22→    .get(id) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  const members = db\n    29→    .prepare(\n    30→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    31→       FROM listing_members lm\n    32→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    33→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    34→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    35→    )\n    36→    .all(id) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    37→\n    38→  const session = await getSession();\n    39→  const isMember = session.userId\n    40→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    41→    : false;\n    42→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    43→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    44→    : false;\n    45→\n    46→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    47→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    50→      { status: 404 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  // Check if the current user has a pending application\n    55→  let hasApplied = false;\n    56→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    57→  if (session.userId && !isMember && listing.requires_approval) {\n    58→    const app = db\n    59→      .prepare(\n    60→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    61→      )\n    62→      .get(id, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    63→    if (app) {\n    64→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    65→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    66→    }\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    70→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    71→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    72→    pendingApplicants = db\n    73→      .prepare(\n    74→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    75→         FROM listing_applications la\n    76→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    77→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    78→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    79→      )\n    80→      .all(id) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    81→  }\n    82→\n    83→  return NextResponse.json({\n    84→    listing: {\n    85→      ...listing,\n    86→      members,\n    87→      memberCount: members.length,\n    88→      isMember,\n    89→      isAuthor,\n    90→      hasApplied,\n    91→      applicationStatus,\n    92→      pendingApplicants,\n    93→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n    94→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    95→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    96→    },\n    97→  });\n    98→}\n    99→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"ab7a3d4d-24af-416f-88a3-4dbf6fbd1bf1","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:02.338Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_017CATWGJcnih4CVrSbSDLHd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01MZJX2TnWLziVssbTCbLaDR","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2666,"cache_read_input_tokens":10931,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2666,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"002ec1e0-d8ac-4cb6-b26f-773a48e9404e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MZJX2TnWLziVssbTCbLaDR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     5→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     6→\n     7→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n     8→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n     9→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    10→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    11→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    12→\n    13→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    14→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    15→\n    16→  if (q) {\n    17→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    18→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    22→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    23→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (readingPace) {\n    27→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    28→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  if (startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom)) {\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    37→\n    38→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    39→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    40→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    41→\n    42→  const listings = db\n    43→    .prepare(\n    44→      `SELECT\n    45→        l.*,\n    46→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    47→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    48→      FROM listings l\n    49→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    50→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    51→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}`\n    52→    )\n    53→    .all(...params);\n    54→\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ listings });\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"5834cc07-ac04-470e-ab8f-f896bbdbbf9e","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:02.470Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01NyjMChSnnaofcTWKggrEeq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01GuFBPWZAvH2hwXSJyLN42p","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3314,"cache_read_input_tokens":13597,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3314,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"a80de7bf-5a4c-40e3-976e-5723aae8bdc8"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GuFBPWZAvH2hwXSJyLN42p","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    20→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    21→\n    22→  if (!listing) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json(\n    28→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    29→      { status: 400 }\n    30→    );\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  // Check if already a member\n    38→  const isMember = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    41→\n    42→  if (isMember) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  // Check if already applied (pending)\n    47→  const existingApp = db\n    48→    .prepare(\n    49→      \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    50→    )\n    51→    .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    52→\n    53→  if (existingApp) {\n    54→    if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    55→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You have already applied\" }, { status: 400 });\n    56→    }\n    57→    if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already approved\" }, { status: 400 });\n    59→    }\n    60→    // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    61→    db.prepare(\n    62→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    63→    ).run(existingApp.id);\n    64→\n    65→    notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    66→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  // Insert new application\n    70→  db.prepare(\n    71→    \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    72→  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    73→\n    74→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    75→\n    76→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    77→}\n    78→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"01894f7e-5826-4574-b22e-35e88d2d95b5","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:06.165Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a6c6355156d4cb6f6","tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":17151,"tool_uses":12,"duration_ms":21051},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"9da06343-6ea5-4164-a9c6-4273ecd5918f","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01NyjMChSnnaofcTWKggrEeq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0173Dab1xm1DYv22Pj83vHhK","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3314,"cache_read_input_tokens":13597,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3314,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"28bc88aa-d63c-434a-86bf-bc5f22e155db"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0173Dab1xm1DYv22Pj83vHhK","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    20→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    21→\n    22→  if (!listing) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    28→  }\n    29→\n    30→  const body = await req.json();\n    31→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    32→\n    33→  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json(\n    35→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    36→      { status: 400 }\n    37→    );\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    41→  const application = db\n    42→    .prepare(\n    43→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    46→\n    47→  if (!application) {\n    48→    return NextResponse.json(\n    49→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    50→      { status: 404 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    55→\n    56→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    57→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    58→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    59→      // Check if group is already full\n    60→      const { count } = db\n    61→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    62→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    63→\n    64→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    65→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    66→      }\n    67→\n    68→      // Update application status\n    69→      db.prepare(\n    70→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    71→      ).run(applicationId);\n    72→\n    73→      // Add to members\n    74→      db.prepare(\n    75→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    76→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    77→\n    78→      // Check if group is now full\n    79→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    80→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    81→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    82→        return { isFull: true };\n    83→      }\n    84→      return { isFull: false };\n    85→    });\n    86→\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const result = approveTransaction();\n    89→\n    90→      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n    91→\n    92→      if (result.isFull) {\n    93→        notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n    94→        // Reject remaining pending applications\n    95→        const pendingApps = db\n    96→          .prepare(\n    97→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    98→          )\n    99→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n   100→\n   101→        for (const app of pendingApps) {\n   102→          db.prepare(\n   103→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   104→          ).run(app.id);\n   105→          notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   106→        }\n   107→      }\n   108→\n   109→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   110→    } catch (err) {\n   111→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   112→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   113→    }\n   114→  } else {\n   115→    // Reject\n   116→    db.prepare(\n   117→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   118→    ).run(applicationId);\n   119→\n   120→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   121→\n   122→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→  }\n   124→}\n   125→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"5f630176-53b6-4cfe-92b9-d0858490099a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:06.700Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a6c6355156d4cb6f6","tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","description":"Reading app/app/api/profile/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":17176,"tool_uses":13,"duration_ms":21419},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"522a6d6f-3d60-4875-b524-c8335592539e","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01NyjMChSnnaofcTWKggrEeq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0117krvWBexBqgebBiCJEuja","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3314,"cache_read_input_tokens":13597,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3314,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"4bcd15cc-0e7e-4da1-b4bb-ab351698a247"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0117krvWBexBqgebBiCJEuja","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    18→    displayName.trim(),\n    19→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    20→    session.userId\n    21→  );\n    22→\n    23→  // Update session\n    24→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    25→  await session.save();\n    26→\n    27→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    28→}\n    29→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"495359dc-eb68-42c9-a864-ef64a272ea1b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:07.067Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a6c6355156d4cb6f6","tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","description":"Reading app/app/api/ratings/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":20370,"tool_uses":14,"duration_ms":25077},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"7fa20eed-da77-4e02-903e-587d9a85ca22","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01UMbVr36QdbspzJ5XR6dkPh","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01GAv3Brn6gcKxBQUVAGCx8S","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3169,"cache_read_input_tokens":16911,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3169,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"fd39f2ec-8df2-42bb-b68e-db652a6ab31f"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GAv3Brn6gcKxBQUVAGCx8S","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    51→  const listing = db\n    52→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    53→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    54→\n    55→  if (!listing) {\n    56→    return NextResponse.json(\n    57→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    58→      { status: 404 }\n    59→    );\n    60→  }\n    61→\n    62→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    65→      { status: 400 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  // Verify both users are members\n    70→  const raterMember = db\n    71→    .prepare(\n    72→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    73→    )\n    74→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    75→\n    76→  if (!raterMember) {\n    77→    return NextResponse.json(\n    78→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n    79→      { status: 403 }\n    80→    );\n    81→  }\n    82→\n    83→  const ratedMember = db\n    84→    .prepare(\n    85→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    86→    )\n    87→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n    88→\n    89→  if (!ratedMember) {\n    90→    return NextResponse.json(\n    91→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n    92→      { status: 400 }\n    93→    );\n    94→  }\n    95→\n    96→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n    97→  const existing = db\n    98→    .prepare(\n    99→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   100→    )\n   101→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   102→\n   103→  if (existing) {\n   104→    db.prepare(\n   105→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   106→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   107→  } else {\n   108→    db.prepare(\n   109→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   110→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   111→\n   112→    // Notify the rated user\n   113→    createNotification(\n   114→      ratedUserId,\n   115→      listingId,\n   116→      \"rating_received\",\n   117→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   118→    );\n   119→  }\n   120→\n   121→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   122→}\n   123→\n   124→/**\n   125→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   126→ *\n   127→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   128→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   129→ */\n   130→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   131→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   132→  if (!session) {\n   133→    return NextResponse.json(\n   134→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   135→      { status: 401 }\n   136→    );\n   137→  }\n   138→\n   139→  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   140→  if (!listingId) {\n   141→    return NextResponse.json(\n   142→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   143→      { status: 400 }\n   144→    );\n   145→  }\n   146→\n   147→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   148→  const givenRatings = db\n   149→    .prepare(\n   150→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   151→       FROM ratings r\n   152→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   153→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   154→    )\n   155→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   156→      rated_user_id: number;\n   157→      score: number;\n   158→      comment: string;\n   159→      display_name: string;\n   160→    }[];\n   161→\n   162→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   163→  const receivedRatings = db\n   164→    .prepare(\n   165→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   166→       FROM ratings r\n   167→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   168→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   169→    )\n   170→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   171→      rater_id: number;\n   172→      score: number;\n   173→      comment: string;\n   174→      display_name: string;\n   175→    }[];\n   176→\n   177→  return NextResponse.json({\n   178→    givenRatings,\n   179→    receivedRatings,\n   180→  });\n   181→}\n   182→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01C53y9Uu5Cyt8xgnYwq99Ev","session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"16885f15-8b27-4259-8793-5ef34dbc62b5","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:02:10.725Z"}
