{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GoDfLCY2zgyYLiuHrZXYr8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const { type } = body;\n    25→\n    26→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    27→      return handleLink(body);\n    28→    }\n    29→\n    30→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    31→    if (type === 1) {\n    32→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    33→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    34→    }\n    35→\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    37→  } catch (err) {\n    38→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    39→    return NextResponse.json(\n    40→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    41→      { status: 500 }\n    42→    );\n    43→  }\n    44→}\n    45→\n    46→async function handleLink(body: {\n    47→  guildId: string;\n    48→  listingId: number;\n    49→  channelId?: string;\n    50→}) {\n    51→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    52→\n    53→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const listing = db\n    61→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    62→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    63→\n    64→  if (!listing) {\n    65→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    66→  }\n    67→\n    68→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    71→      { status: 400 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n    76→\n    77→  // If no channel specified, create one\n    78→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    79→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    80→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n    81→      .toLowerCase()\n    82→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n    83→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n    84→\n    85→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n    86→      guildId,\n    87→      channelName,\n    88→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    89→    );\n    90→\n    91→    if (!channel) {\n    92→      return NextResponse.json(\n    93→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n    94→        { status: 500 }\n    95→      );\n    96→    }\n    97→\n    98→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  // Create invite link\n   102→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   103→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   104→    return NextResponse.json(\n   105→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   106→      { status: 500 }\n   107→    );\n   108→  }\n   109→\n   110→  // Save to DB\n   111→  db.prepare(\n   112→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   113→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   114→\n   115→  // Notify all members\n   116→  const members = db\n   117→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   118→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   119→\n   120→  for (const member of members) {\n   121→    createNotification(\n   122→      member.user_id,\n   123→      listingId,\n   124→      \"discord_ready\",\n   125→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   126→    );\n   127→  }\n   128→\n   129→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   130→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   131→    targetChannelId,\n   132→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   133→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   134→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   135→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   136→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   137→  );\n   138→\n   139→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   140→}\n   141→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"303f3cc1-baa8-4625-9fe7-43919aaef7ba","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:36.244Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","numLines":141,"startLine":1,"totalLines":141}}}

  2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  try {\n     8→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n     9→\n    10→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    11→      return NextResponse.json(\n    12→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    13→        { status: 400 }\n    14→      );\n    15→    }\n    16→\n    17→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    18→      return NextResponse.json(\n    19→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    20→        { status: 400 }\n    21→      );\n    22→    }\n    23→\n    24→    // Check if email is already taken\n    25→    const existing = db\n    26→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    27→      .get(email);\n    28→    if (existing) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    31→        { status: 409 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    36→\n    37→    const result = db\n    38→      .prepare(\n    39→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    40→      )\n    41→      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    42→\n    43→    // Auto-login after registration\n    44→    const session = await getSession();\n    45→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    46→    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    47→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    48→    await session.save();\n    49→\n    50→    return NextResponse.json(\n    51→      {\n    52→        user: {\n    53→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    54→          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n    55→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    56→        },\n    57→      },\n    58→      { status: 201 }\n    59→    );\n    60→  } catch (error) {\n    61→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    62→    return NextResponse.json(\n    63→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    64→      { status: 500 }\n    65→    );\n    66→  }\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"bfa39af7-b4ea-4e4b-88fe-7e7b9050e665","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:36.665Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Check if email is already taken\n    const existing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n      .get(email);\n    if (existing) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n      )\n      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n\n    // Auto-login after registration\n    const session = await getSession();\n    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    await session.save();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        user: {\n          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n        },\n      },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","numLines":68,"startLine":1,"totalLines":68}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014pnFVA66DE6jmupqvjhTUv","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    18→    displayName.trim(),\n    19→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    20→    session.userId\n    21→  );\n    22→\n    23→  // Update session\n    24→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    25→  await session.save();\n    26→\n    27→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    28→}\n    29→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"038cc0a0-3622-416b-adad-a973707596f0","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:37.123Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    displayName.trim(),\n    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    session.userId\n  );\n\n  // Update session\n  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n  await session.save();\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":29,"startLine":1,"totalLines":29}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015T1pWxwL2Cpg9QgX4PHb8k","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\") || session.userId;\n    21→\n    22→  // Average score\n    23→  const stats = db\n    24→    .prepare(\n    25→      `SELECT\n    26→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    27→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    28→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    29→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    30→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    31→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    32→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    33→       FROM ratings\n    34→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    35→    )\n    36→    .get(userId) as {\n    37→      total_ratings: number;\n    38→      average_score: number | null;\n    39→      five_star: number;\n    40→      four_star: number;\n    41→      three_star: number;\n    42→      two_star: number;\n    43→      one_star: number;\n    44→    };\n    45→\n    46→  // Number of completed groups\n    47→  const completedGroups = db\n    48→    .prepare(\n    49→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    50→       FROM listing_members lm\n    51→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    52→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    53→    )\n    54→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    55→\n    56→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    57→  const groupsRated = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    60→       FROM ratings\n    61→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    66→  const recentRatings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    69→       FROM ratings r\n    70→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    71→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    72→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    73→       LIMIT 10`\n    74→    )\n    75→    .all(userId) as {\n    76→      score: number;\n    77→      comment: string;\n    78→      created_at: string;\n    79→      book_title: string;\n    80→    }[];\n    81→\n    82→  return NextResponse.json({\n    83→    reputation: {\n    84→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n    85→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n    86→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n    87→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n    88→      breakdown: {\n    89→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n    90→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n    91→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n    92→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n    93→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n    94→      },\n    95→      recentRatings,\n    96→    },\n    97→  });\n    98→}\n    99→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"54f182ae-6a05-40de-9475-a184d658237a","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:37.224Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n *\n * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const userId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\") || session.userId;\n\n  // Average score\n  const stats = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as {\n      total_ratings: number;\n      average_score: number | null;\n      five_star: number;\n      four_star: number;\n      three_star: number;\n      two_star: number;\n      one_star: number;\n    };\n\n  // Number of completed groups\n  const completedGroups = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n  const groupsRated = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n  const recentRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n       LIMIT 10`\n    )\n    .all(userId) as {\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      created_at: string;\n      book_title: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","numLines":99,"startLine":1,"totalLines":99}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UYv9ujsDjeVwwJosJ44s6L","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  try {\n    12→    const body = await req.json();\n    13→    const {\n    14→      bookTitle,\n    15→      bookAuthor,\n    16→      bookCoverUrl,\n    17→      bookOlid,\n    18→      language,\n    19→      readingPace,\n    20→      startDate,\n    21→      meetingFormat,\n    22→      maxGroupSize,\n    23→      requiresApproval,\n    24→      platformPreference,\n    25→    } = body;\n    26→\n    27→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    28→      return NextResponse.json(\n    29→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    30→        { status: 400 }\n    31→      );\n    32→    }\n    33→\n    34→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    35→      return NextResponse.json(\n    36→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    37→        { status: 400 }\n    38→      );\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    42→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    43→      return NextResponse.json(\n    44→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    45→        { status: 400 }\n    46→      );\n    47→    }\n    48→\n    49→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n    50→      ? platformPreference\n    51→      : \"telegram\";\n    52→\n    53→    const result = db\n    54→      .prepare(\n    55→        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n    56→         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n    57→      )\n    58→      .run(\n    59→        session.userId,\n    60→        bookTitle.trim(),\n    61→        bookAuthor.trim(),\n    62→        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n    63→        bookOlid || \"\",\n    64→        language || \"English\",\n    65→        readingPace.trim(),\n    66→        startDate,\n    67→        meetingFormat,\n    68→        size,\n    69→        requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n    70→        platform\n    71→      );\n    72→\n    73→    // Auto-join the author as a member\n    74→    db.prepare(\n    75→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    76→    ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n    77→\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { id: result.lastInsertRowid },\n    80→      { status: 201 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  } catch (error) {\n    83→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    86→      { status: 500 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"60fe260b-3990-4f0e-97f9-aad55082f023","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:41.557Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n      ? platformPreference\n      : \"telegram\";\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size,\n        requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n        platform\n      );\n\n    // Auto-join the author as a member\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { id: result.lastInsertRowid },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","numLines":90,"startLine":1,"totalLines":90}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Xg6fgKP9DgkZC91eWz3AyH","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    51→  const listing = db\n    52→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    53→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    54→\n    55→  if (!listing) {\n    56→    return NextResponse.json(\n    57→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    58→      { status: 404 }\n    59→    );\n    60→  }\n    61→\n    62→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    63→    return NextResponse.json(\n    64→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    65→      { status: 400 }\n    66→    );\n    67→  }\n    68→\n    69→  // Verify both users are members\n    70→  const raterMember = db\n    71→    .prepare(\n    72→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    73→    )\n    74→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    75→\n    76→  if (!raterMember) {\n    77→    return NextResponse.json(\n    78→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n    79→      { status: 403 }\n    80→    );\n    81→  }\n    82→\n    83→  const ratedMember = db\n    84→    .prepare(\n    85→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    86→    )\n    87→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n    88→\n    89→  if (!ratedMember) {\n    90→    return NextResponse.json(\n    91→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n    92→      { status: 400 }\n    93→    );\n    94→  }\n    95→\n    96→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n    97→  const existing = db\n    98→    .prepare(\n    99→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   100→    )\n   101→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   102→\n   103→  if (existing) {\n   104→    db.prepare(\n   105→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   106→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   107→  } else {\n   108→    db.prepare(\n   109→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   110→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   111→\n   112→    // Notify the rated user\n   113→    createNotification(\n   114→      ratedUserId,\n   115→      listingId,\n   116→      \"rating_received\",\n   117→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   118→    );\n   119→  }\n   120→\n   121→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   122→}\n   123→\n   124→/**\n   125→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   126→ *\n   127→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   128→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   129→ */\n   130→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   131→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   132→  if (!session) {\n   133→    return NextResponse.json(\n   134→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   135→      { status: 401 }\n   136→    );\n   137→  }\n   138→\n   139→  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   140→  if (!listingId) {\n   141→    return NextResponse.json(\n   142→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   143→      { status: 400 }\n   144→    );\n   145→  }\n   146→\n   147→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   148→  const givenRatings = db\n   149→    .prepare(\n   150→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   151→       FROM ratings r\n   152→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   153→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   154→    )\n   155→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   156→      rated_user_id: number;\n   157→      score: number;\n   158→      comment: string;\n   159→      display_name: string;\n   160→    }[];\n   161→\n   162→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   163→  const receivedRatings = db\n   164→    .prepare(\n   165→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   166→       FROM ratings r\n   167→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   168→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   169→    )\n   170→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   171→      rater_id: number;\n   172→      score: number;\n   173→      comment: string;\n   174→      display_name: string;\n   175→    }[];\n   176→\n   177→  return NextResponse.json({\n   178→    givenRatings,\n   179→    receivedRatings,\n   180→  });\n   181→}\n   182→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"0cd37cb8-7297-4fd4-94d8-e584db76e490","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:42.209Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n *\n * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n *\n * Rules:\n * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n * - Cannot rate yourself\n * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n\n  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify listing exists and is full\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify both users are members\n  const raterMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (!raterMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const ratedMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n\n  if (!ratedMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (existing) {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n  } else {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n\n    // Notify the rated user\n    createNotification(\n      ratedUserId,\n      listingId,\n      \"rating_received\",\n      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n *\n * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n * plus the members who can still be rated.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n  if (!listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n  const givenRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rated_user_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n  const receivedRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rater_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    givenRatings,\n    receivedRatings,\n  });\n}\n","numLines":182,"startLine":1,"totalLines":182}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019xRbHa941zi7AD9urs7xMP","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    15→ *\n    16→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    17→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    18→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    20→ *\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    22→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    23→ */\n    24→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    25→  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n    26→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    27→  if (webhookSecret) {\n    28→    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    29→    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    30→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→    }\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    35→  try {\n    36→    update = await req.json();\n    37→  } catch {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    42→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    43→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    44→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    45→    );\n    46→  }\n    47→\n    48→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    49→  if (update.message) {\n    50→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    54→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    55→}\n    56→\n    57→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    58→  chat: {\n    59→    id: number;\n    60→    title?: string;\n    61→    type: string;\n    62→  };\n    63→  from: {\n    64→    id: number;\n    65→    first_name: string;\n    66→  };\n    67→  new_chat_member: {\n    68→    user: {\n    69→      id: number;\n    70→      is_bot: boolean;\n    71→    };\n    72→    status: string;\n    73→  };\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→interface TelegramMessage {\n    77→  chat: {\n    78→    id: number;\n    79→    type: string;\n    80→    title?: string;\n    81→  };\n    82→  text?: string;\n    83→  from?: {\n    84→    id: number;\n    85→  };\n    86→}\n    87→\n    88→/**\n    89→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    90→ *\n    91→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    92→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    93→ * 1. Creates the group\n    94→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    95→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    96→ *\n    97→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n    98→ */\n    99→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   100→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   101→\n   102→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   103→  if (\n   104→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   105→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   106→  ) {\n   107→    return;\n   108→  }\n   109→\n   110→  // Only process group chats\n   111→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   112→    return;\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   116→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   117→  const pending = db\n   118→    .prepare(\n   119→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   120→    )\n   121→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   122→\n   123→  if (pending) {\n   124→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   125→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   126→      chat.id\n   127→    );\n   128→    return;\n   129→  }\n   130→\n   131→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   132→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   133→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   134→  await sendMessage(\n   135→    chat.id,\n   136→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   137→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   138→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   139→  );\n   140→\n   141→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   142→  try {\n   143→    db.prepare(\n   144→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   145→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   146→  } catch {\n   147→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   148→  }\n   149→}\n   150→\n   151→/**\n   152→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   153→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   154→ */\n   155→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   156→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   157→    return;\n   158→  }\n   159→\n   160→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   161→\n   162→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   163→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   164→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   165→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   166→    if (listingId) {\n   167→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   168→      return;\n   169→    }\n   170→  }\n   171→\n   172→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   173→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   174→    // Find the most recent full listing without a telegram link\n   175→    // that was authored by someone (we can't verify Telegram user = Bookmate user\n   176→    // without account linking, so we just report available listings)\n   177→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   178→      .prepare(\n   179→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   180→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   181→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   182→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   183→      )\n   184→      .all() as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   185→\n   186→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   187→      await sendMessage(\n   188→        message.chat.id,\n   189→        \"No unlinked reading groups found. The group may already be set up!\"\n   190→      );\n   191→      return;\n   192→    }\n   193→\n   194→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   195→      // Auto-link the only available listing\n   196→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→\n   200→    // Show options\n   201→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   202→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n   203→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   204→    await sendMessage(\n   205→      message.chat.id,\n   206→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   207→    );\n   208→    return;\n   209→  }\n   210→\n   211→  // Handle /link_ID command\n   212→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   213→  if (linkMatch) {\n   214→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   215→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   216→  }\n   217→}\n   218→\n   219→/**\n   220→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   221→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   222→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   223→ * 3. Notify all members\n   224→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   225→ */\n   226→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   227→  const listing = db\n   228→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   229→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   230→\n   231→  if (!listing) {\n   232→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   233→    return;\n   234→  }\n   235→\n   236→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   237→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   238→    return;\n   239→  }\n   240→\n   241→  // Try to create an invite link\n   242→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   243→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   244→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   245→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   246→  }\n   247→\n   248→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   249→    await sendMessage(\n   250→      chatId,\n   251→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   252→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   253→    );\n   254→    return;\n   255→  }\n   256→\n   257→  // Save to database\n   258→  db.prepare(\n   259→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   260→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   261→\n   262→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   263→  const members = db\n   264→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   265→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   266→\n   267→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   268→  for (const member of members) {\n   269→    createNotification(\n   270→      member.user_id,\n   271→      listingId,\n   272→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   273→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   274→    );\n   275→  }\n   276→\n   277→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   278→  await sendMessage(\n   279→    chatId,\n   280→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   281→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   282→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   283→  );\n   284→}\n   285→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"006a0c89-9d12-4fce-93bd-6c8995807009","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:03:42.295Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    // Find the most recent full listing without a telegram link\n    // that was authored by someone (we can't verify Telegram user = Bookmate user\n    // without account linking, so we just report available listings)\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all() as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      // Auto-link the only available listing\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Show options\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","numLines":285,"startLine":1,"totalLines":285}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01YTWzkfo3zjg4dF6cMgGqQ7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I have all the context. Let me implement the fixes for the most critical issues:\n\n**Fix 1:** Session secret — throw on missing env var in production\n**Fix 2:** Race condition — wrap join in transaction\n**Fix 3:** Discord webhook — add secret verification\n**Fix 4:** Input length limits — add max length checks\n**Fix 5:** Reputation IDOR — restrict recent ratings for other users\n**Fix 6:** Telegram /link — add comment acknowledging limitation"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7039,"cache_read_input_tokens":33518,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7039},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"1507299c-225f-4ff3-8578-d2f7081c5cb4"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01YTWzkfo3zjg4dF6cMgGqQ7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01TrMjWFfj8Appq5RNEsxY5P","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/session.ts","old_string":"export interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nconst sessionOptions: SessionOptions = {\n  password:\n    process.env.SESSION_SECRET ||\n    \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\",\n  cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",","new_string":"export interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nfunction getSessionSecret(): string {\n  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    throw new Error(\n      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    );\n  }\n  return (\n    secret ||\n    \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\"\n  );\n}\n\nconst sessionOptions: SessionOptions = {\n  password: getSessionSecret(),\n  cookieName: \"bookmate_session\","},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7039,"cache_read_input_tokens":33518,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7039},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"c0826d73-d2c9-46b9-b97c-5621bdc53d5a"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01YTWzkfo3zjg4dF6cMgGqQ7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01F2n2eUt6Ly85T9eQ5hY7rn","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","old_string":"  // Count current members\n  const { count } = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n  if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Join\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  // Notify the author\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  // Check if group is now full\n  const newCount = count + 1;\n  if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: newCount });","new_string":"  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7039,"cache_read_input_tokens":33518,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7039},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"a87cedd4-37bb-4f87-a488-63dc11bb6912"}

 // Count current members\n  const { count } = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n  if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Join\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  // Notify the author\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  // Check if group is now full\n  const newCount = count + 1;\n  if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: newCount });","newString":"  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Count current members\n  const { count } = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n  if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Join\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  // Notify the author\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  // Check if group is now full\n  const newCount = count + 1;\n  if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: newCount });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":45,"oldLines":29,"newStart":45,"newLines":40,"lines":[" author","+    const newCount = count + 1;","+    if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","+      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);","+    }","+","+    return { error: null, count: newCount };","+  });","+","+  const result = joinTransaction();","+","+  if (result.error) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });","+  }","+","+  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)","   notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");"," ","-  // Check if group is now full","-  const newCount = count + 1;","-  if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","-    db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);","+  if (result.count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","     notifyGroupFull(listingId);","   }"," ","-  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: newCount });","+  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01YTWzkfo3zjg4dF6cMgGqQ7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FsoUr5SQANbJV2hHrjEtK3","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }","new_string":"export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7039,"cache_read_input_tokens":33518,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7039},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"187d3943-1c4b-4c9d-956a-dcb420b68a1e"}
