{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FsoUr5SQANbJV2hHrjEtK3","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"7ffc9a8f-1f4c-4f58-94e4-a1dd68c736ba","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:04:06.117Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }","newString":"export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret if configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (webhookSecret) {\n    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":19,"oldLines":6,"newStart":19,"newLines":15,"lines":["  * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.","  */"," export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {","+  // Verify webhook secret if configured","+  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;","+  if (webhookSecret) {","+    const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");","+    if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {","+      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });","+    }","+  }","+","   try {","     const body = await req.json();","     const { type } = body;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

(password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    if (password.length > 72) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (email.length > 254) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Check if email is already taken\n    const existing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n      .get(email);\n    if (existing) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n      )\n      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n\n    // Auto-login after registration\n    const session = await getSession();\n    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    await session.save();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        user: {\n          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n        },\n      },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":21,"oldLines":6,"newStart":21,"newLines":28,"lines":["       );","     }"," ","+    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    displayName.trim(),\n    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    session.userId\n  );\n\n  // Update session\n  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n  await session.save();\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":14,"oldLines":6,"newStart":14,"newLines":14,"lines":["     return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });","   }"," ","+  if (displayName.length > 100) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }","+","+  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });","+  }","+","   db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      bookTitle,\n      bookAuthor,\n      bookCoverUrl,\n      bookOlid,\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n      ? platformPreference\n      : \"telegram\";\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n      )\n      .run(\n        session.userId,\n        bookTitle.trim(),\n        bookAuthor.trim(),\n        bookCoverUrl || \"\",\n        bookOlid || \"\",\n        language || \"English\",\n        readingPace.trim(),\n        startDate,\n        meetingFormat,\n        size,\n        requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n        platform\n      );\n\n    // Auto-join the author as a member\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { id: result.lastInsertRowid },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":31,"oldLines":6,"newStart":31,"newLines":14,"lines":["       );","     }"," ","+    // {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01SwkUmgzGXdE2SYHoPrBiqG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WZUWfBzoEzcaLWuyM7NRdk","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts","old_string":"  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","new_string":"  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1683,"cache_read_input_tokens":40557,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1683},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"a969a4af-1799-4ef8-a4e7-e915549e2d09"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1683,"cache_read_input_tokens":40557,"output_tokens":1208},"context_management":{"applied_edits":[]}},"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"95273469-8c8e-4a11-8b6c-546497a722fb"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WZUWfBzoEzcaLWuyM7NRdk","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"b0b16a8d-ad97-4bea-b4e1-a53f68f75396","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:04:20.570Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts","oldString":"  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","newString":"  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n *\n * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n *\n * Rules:\n * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n * - Cannot rate yourself\n * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n\n  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify listing exists and is full\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify both users are members\n  const raterMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (!raterMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const ratedMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n\n  if (!ratedMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (existing) {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n  } else {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n\n    // Notify the rated user\n    createNotification(\n      ratedUserId,\n      listingId,\n      \"rating_received\",\n      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n *\n * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n * plus the members who can still be rated.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listingId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n  if (!listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n  const givenRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rated_user_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n  const receivedRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rater_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    givenRatings,\n    receivedRatings,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":47,"oldLines":6,"newStart":47,"newLines":13,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","+  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   // Verify listing exists and is full","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01WbjKtok7TUHTcmNgGspVCG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_012gLgRAxhZQG8Hv4raZJGCN","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","old_string":"  const userId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\") || session.userId;","new_string":"  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n\n  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1417,"cache_read_input_tokens":42240,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1417},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"63cb412d-7f78-4940-800a-76849603e222"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":2,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\""}},"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"88da3968-32be-4b9a-9af6-b52ffb2086b3"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012gLgRAxhZQG8Hv4raZJGCN","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"433f8921-1ffa-477a-95cf-0961da6d5f0b","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:04:26.038Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","oldString":"  const userId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\") || session.userId;","newString":"  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n\n  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n *\n * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const userId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\") || session.userId;\n\n  // Average score\n  const stats = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as {\n      total_ratings: number;\n      average_score: number | null;\n      five_star: number;\n      four_star: number;\n      three_star: number;\n      two_star: number;\n      one_star: number;\n    };\n\n  // Number of completed groups\n  const completedGroups = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n  const groupsRated = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n  const recentRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n       LIMIT 10`\n    )\n    .all(userId) as {\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      created_at: string;\n      book_title: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":17,"oldLines":8,"newStart":17,"newLines":17,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","-  const userId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\") || session.userId;","+  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");","+  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;","+  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;"," ","+  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   // Average score","   const stats = db","     .prepare("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01WbjKtok7TUHTcmNgGspVCG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QxgN3jj8sRVubShetjdhUT","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","old_string":"  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings,\n    },\n  });","new_string":"  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    ? recentRatings\n    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n        score,\n        created_at,\n        book_title,\n      }));\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n    },\n  });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1417,"cache_read_input_tokens":42240,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1417},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"e8f8573e-41fd-4244-81b6-d28d1b54bd5f"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QxgN3jj8sRVubShetjdhUT","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"22dec22a-37f7-4270-91ab-669ceb9e50c1","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:04:31.282Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","oldString":"  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings,\n    },\n  });","newString":"  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    ? recentRatings\n    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n        score,\n        created_at,\n        book_title,\n      }));\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n    },\n  });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n *\n * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n\n  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Average score\n  const stats = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as {\n      total_ratings: number;\n      average_score: number | null;\n      five_star: number;\n      four_star: number;\n      three_star: number;\n      two_star: number;\n      one_star: number;\n    };\n\n  // Number of completed groups\n  const completedGroups = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n  const groupsRated = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n  const recentRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n       LIMIT 10`\n    )\n    .all(userId) as {\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      created_at: string;\n      book_title: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":88,"oldLines":6,"newStart":88,"newLines":15,"lines":["       book_title: string;","     }[];"," ","+  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)","+  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile","+    ? recentRatings","+    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({","+        score,","+        created_at,","+        book_title,","+      }));","+","   return NextResponse.json({","     reputation: {","       averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,"]},{"oldStart":101,"oldLines":7,"newStart":110,"newLines":7,"lines":["         2: stats.two_star || 0,","         1: stats.one_star || 0,","       },","-      recentRatings,","+      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,","     },","   });"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

string;\n     8→}\n     9→\n    10→function getSessionSecret(): string {\n    11→  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n    12→  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\"\n    20→  );\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→const sessionOptions: SessionOptions = {\n    24→  password: getSessionSecret(),\n    25→  cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n    26→  cookieOptions: {\n    27→    httpOnly: true,\n    28→    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n    29→    sameSite: \"lax\",\n    30→    maxAge: 46→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"0b52e658-29a3-4577-be7e-8682180162f5","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:04:58.997Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/session.ts","content":"import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\nimport { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\n\nexport interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nfunction getSessionSecret(): string {\n  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    throw new Error(\n      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    );\n  }\n  return (\n    secret ||\n    \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\"\n  );\n}\n\nconst sessionOptions: SessionOptions = {\n  password: getSessionSecret(),\n  cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n  cookieOptions: {\n    httpOnly: true,\n    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n    sameSite: \"lax\",\n    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n  },\n};\n\nexport async function getSession() {\n  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, sessionOptions);\n}\n\nexport async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}\n","numLines":46,"startLine":1,"totalLines":46}}}

{"]}],"originalFile":"import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\nimport { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\n\nexport interface SessionData {\n  userId?: number;\n  email?: string;\n  displayName?: string;\n}\n\nfunction getSessionSecret(): string {\n  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    throw new Error(\n      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    );\n  }\n  return (\n    secret ||\n    \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\"\n  );\n}\n\nconst sessionOptions: SessionOptions = {\n  password: getSessionSecret(),\n  cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n  cookieOptions: {\n    httpOnly: true,\n    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\",\n    sameSite: \"lax\",\n    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n  },\n};\n\nexport async function getSession() {\n  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, sessionOptions);\n}\n\nexport async function requireAuth() {\n  const session = await getSession();\n  if (!session.userId) {\n    return null;\n  }\n  return session;\n}\n"}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01GLhRsmBdcJyFSAi3AsKeyQ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VMWQVKFHzFXMjaNRREjfMn","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: security hardening — session secret, race condition, input validation, webhook auth\n\n- Session secret: throw at runtime if SESSION_SECRET missing in production (lazy check to avoid build failure)\n- Join race condition: wrap member count check + insert in db.transaction() to prevent exceeding max_group_size\n- Discord webhook: add DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET header verification (matching Telegram webhook pattern)\n- Input validation: add max length limits on password (72), displayName (100), email (254), bio (500), book fields, and rating comments\n- Reputation IDOR: strip private comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles\n- Parse userId as integer in reputation endpoint\n\nCloses #31\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit security fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":228,"cache_read_input_tokens":52559,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":228},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"28553a31-c580-4e37-98d9-1415879b3659"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01EznQJiz4PxVhztZL1hKUQw","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01T7g24M2bn4Ba9DF7d1qWbK","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: security hardening — 6 issues from code review\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n\nAddresses 6 security and correctness issues found via comprehensive code review:\n\n- **Session secret enforcement**: Throws at runtime if `SESSION_SECRET` is missing in production (lazy check avoids build-time failure). Development fallback preserved for local dev.\n- **Join race condition**: Wrapped count-check + INSERT in `db.transaction()` to prevent concurrent requests from exceeding `max_group_size`. Matches the pattern already used in the approval flow.\n- **Discord webhook auth**: Added `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET` header verification, matching the existing Telegram webhook pattern.\n- **Input length limits**: Added max-length validation on password (72 chars — bcrypt's limit), displayName (100), email (254), bio (500), book title/author/pace, and rating comments (1000). Prevents DoS via bcrypt on long passwords and unbounded DB growth.\n- **Reputation IDOR**: Rating comments are now stripped when viewing another user's profile. Only scores, dates, and book titles are visible to others.\n- **userId type safety**: Parse `userId` query param as integer in reputation endpoint.\n\n## Test plan\n\n- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`) ✅\n- [ ] Registration rejects passwords > 72 chars\n- [ ] Registration rejects displayName > 100 chars\n- [ ] Profile update rejects bio > 500 chars\n- [ ] Join endpoint doesn't allow exceeding max_group_size under concurrent load\n- [ ] Discord webhook returns 403 without correct secret header (when configured)\n- [ ] Reputation endpoint hides comments for non-self profiles\n- [ ] App works normally in development without SESSION_SECRET set\n\nCloses #31\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create security fix PR"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":259,"cache_read_input_tokens":53117,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":259},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"ff460ab5-14bc-4f5d-926d-1a8632534679"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017gDuiGzg7ZGqo2JmUregZw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→# Agent Memory\n     2→\n     3→## Project\n     4→- **Name**: Bookmate\n     5→- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n     6→- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n     7→- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n     8→- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n     9→\n    10→## Current State\n    11→- All 7 P0 issues (#1-#7) completed and merged\n    12→- All 3 P1 issues (#8, #9, #10) completed and merged\n    13→- P2 #12 (Approval System) merged via PR #19\n    14→- P2 #11 (Auto Telegram) merged via PR #20\n    15→- P2 #13 (Rating System) merged via PR #22\n    16→- P2 #14 (Discord Support) merged via PR #23\n    17→- #24 (Docker deployment) merged via PR #25\n    18→- PRD gap issues created: #26, #27, #28 — all addressed in PR #30\n    19→\n    20→## Open PRs\n    21→- #30: PRD gap fixes — email notifications, listing visibility, browse filters (fix/full-listing-visibility) — closes #26, #27, #28\n    22→\n    23→## Open Issues\n    24→- #26: Email notifications (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n    25→- #27: Full listing visibility (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n    26→- #28: Browse filters (P1, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n    27→- needs-human: #21 (Telegram bot token setup) — stale, reminder posted\n    28→\n    29→## Important Notes\n    30→- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n    31→- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n    32→- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n    33→- agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead\n    34→- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n    35→- No production environment deployed yet\n    36→- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings\n    37→- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n    38→- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID env vars\n    39→- Listings now have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n    40→- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n    41→- .env.example documents all env vars including SMTP\n    42→- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n    43→\n    44→## Next Session Priority\n    45→1. Merge PR #30 if no objections after 1 session\n    46→2. Check issue #21 for human response\n    47→3. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint\n    48→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"ca2ed040-1270-4759-88f2-27f59f96ddfb","timestamp":"2026-03-20T11:06:19.091Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/memory/MEMORY.md","content":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All 7 P0 issues (#1-#7) completed and merged\n- All 3 P1 issues (#8, #9, #10) completed and merged\n- P2 #12 (Approval System) merged via PR #19\n- P2 #11 (Auto Telegram) merged via PR #20\n- P2 #13 (Rating System) merged via PR #22\n- P2 #14 (Discord Support) merged via PR #23\n- #24 (Docker deployment) merged via PR #25\n- PRD gap issues created: #26, #27, #28 — all addressed in PR #30\n\n## Open PRs\n- #30: PRD gap fixes — email notifications, listing visibility, browse filters (fix/full-listing-visibility) — closes #26, #27, #28\n\n## Open Issues\n- #26: Email notifications (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n- #27: Full listing visibility (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n- #28: Browse filters (P1, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n- needs-human: #21 (Telegram bot token setup) — stale, reminder posted\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- No production environment deployed yet\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID env vars\n- Listings now have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- .env.example documents all env vars including SMTP\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #30 if no objections after 1 session\n2. Check issue #21 for human response\n3. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint\n","numLines":48,"startLine":1,"totalLines":48}}}

Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)\n- PRD gap fixes (#26, #27, #28) merged via PR #30\n- Docker deployment (#24) merged via PR #25\n\n## Open PRs\n- #32: Security hardening — session secret, race condition, input validation, webhook auth, reputation IDOR (fix/security-hardening) — closes #31\n\n## Open Issues\n- #31: Security & correctness fixes (P0, approved, bug) — addressed in PR #32\n- #29: Demo video (P0, not approved yet) — commented asking for approval\n- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — stale, no response\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- No production environment deployed yet\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #32 if no objections after 1 session\n2. Check issue #29 for approval response\n3. Check issue #21 for human response\n4. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":933,"cache_read_input_tokens":54114,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":933},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"d9816765-a497-4e40-a646-a34a714ded0f"}

needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- No production environment deployed yet\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings, telegram_chats, pending_telegram_groups\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #32 if no objections after 1 session\n2. Check issue #29 for approval response\n3. Check issue #21 for human response\n4. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":8,"oldLines":23,"newStart":8,"newLines":17,"lines":[" - **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)"," "," ## Current State","-- All 7 P0 issues (#1-#7) completed and merged","-- All 3 P1 issues (#8, #9, #10) completed and merged","-- P2 #12 (Approval System) merged via PR #19","-- P2 #11 (Auto Telegram) merged via PR #20","-- P2 #13 (Rating System) merged via PR #22","-- P2 #14 (Discord Support) merged via PR #23","-- #24 (Docker deployment) merged via PR #25","-- PRD gap issues created: #26, #27, #28 — all addressed in PR #30","+- All PRD features implemented and merged (P0, P1, P2)","+- PRD gap fixes (#26, #27, #28) merged via PR #30","+- Docker deployment (#24) merged via PR #25"," "," ## Open PRs","-- #30: PRD gap fixes — email notifications, listing visibility, browse filters (fix/full-listing-visibility) — closes #26, #27, #28","+- #32: Security hardening — session secret, race condition, input validation, webhook auth, reputation IDOR (fix/security-hardening) — closes #31"," "," ## Open Issues","-- #26: Email notifications (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30","-- #27: Full listing visibility (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30","-- #28: Browse filters (P1, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30","-- needs-human: #21 (Telegram bot token setup) — stale, reminder posted","+- #31: Security & correctness fixes (P0, approved, bug) — addressed in PR #32","+- #29: Demo video (P0, not approved yet) — commented asking for approval","+- #21: Telegram bot token (needs-human) — stale, no response"," "," ## Important Notes"," - GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`"]},{"oldStart":33,"oldLines":15,"newStart":27,"newLines":16,"lines":[" - agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead"," - Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)","-- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID env vars","-- Listings now have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)","+- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars","+- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)"," - Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)","-- .env.example documents all env vars including SMTP"," - nodemailer added as dependency for email sending","+- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure"," "," ## Next Session Priority","-1. Merge PR #30 if no objections after 1 session","-2. Check issue #21 for human response","-3. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint","+1. Merge PR #32 if no objections after 1 session","+2. Check issue #29 for approval response","+3. Check issue #21 for human response","+4. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint"]}],"originalFile":"# Agent Memory\n\n## Project\n- **Name**: Bookmate\n- **Repo**: https://github.com/TommyBrennan/bookmate\n- **Project Board**: Bookmate (project #1 on TommyBrennan)\n- **Tech**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, SQLite, iron-session\n- **Owner**: XanderZhu (human), TommyBrennan (GH account)\n\n## Current State\n- All 7 P0 issues (#1-#7) completed and merged\n- All 3 P1 issues (#8, #9, #10) completed and merged\n- P2 #12 (Approval System) merged via PR #19\n- P2 #11 (Auto Telegram) merged via PR #20\n- P2 #13 (Rating System) merged via PR #22\n- P2 #14 (Discord Support) merged via PR #23\n- #24 (Docker deployment) merged via PR #25\n- PRD gap issues created: #26, #27, #28 — all addressed in PR #30\n\n## Open PRs\n- #30: PRD gap fixes — email notifications, listing visibility, browse filters (fix/full-listing-visibility) — closes #26, #27, #28\n\n## Open Issues\n- #26: Email notifications (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n- #27: Full listing visibility (P0, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n- #28: Browse filters (P1, approved, prd) — addressed in PR #30\n- needs-human: #21 (Telegram bot token setup) — stale, reminder posted\n\n## Important Notes\n- GH_TOKEN loaded from `.claude-beat/.env`\n- Remote URL includes PAT: reset with `git remote set-url` if needed\n- Next.js 15 used (not 16) due to Turbopack /root permission issue\n- agent-browser consistently crashes in this container (Chromium memory) — verify with curl instead\n- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n- No production environment deployed yet\n- DB tables: users, listings, listing_members, listing_applications, user_genres, notifications, ratings\n- Telegram bot integration requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID env vars\n- Listings now have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n- .env.example documents all env vars including SMTP\n- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Merge PR #30 if no objections after 1 session\n2. Check issue #21 for human response\n3. Consider: CI pipeline, production deployment, healthcheck endpoint\n"}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01VDjWs9dQA7Q698A9rEavLP","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01WoyUWQqLHuUxFdPZQnosCM","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-20_11-00.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-20 11:00 UTC\n\n## Duration\n~10 minutes\n\n## Review Findings\n- PR #30 (PRD gap fixes) was already merged — confirmed on main\n- Issue #29 (demo video) has P0 but no `approved` label — commented asking for approval\n- Issue #21 (Telegram bot token) still needs-human, no response\n- No relevant Bookmate emails (only NomadLingo notifications)\n- All PRD features implemented — good time for code quality\n\n## Actions Taken\n\n### 1. Confirmed PR #30 Merge\n- PR #30 was already merged into main\n- Switched to main and pulled latest\n\n### 2. Comprehensive Code Review\n- Ran code review agent across all API routes, auth, and DB layer\n- Found 6 security/correctness issues\n\n### 3. Security Hardening (PR #32, Issue #31)\nCreated and fixed all 6 issues:\n\n1. **Session secret**: Lazy runtime check throws in production if missing; dev fallback preserved\n2. **Join race condition**: Wrapped in `db.transaction()` to prevent exceeding max_group_size\n3. **Discord webhook auth**: Added `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET` header verification\n4. **Input length limits**: Password (72), displayName (100), email (254), bio (500), book fields, rating comments (1000)\n5. **Reputation IDOR**: Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles\n6. **userId type safety**: Parse as integer in reputation endpoint\n\nBuild passes. PR #32 opened and added to project board.\n\n### 4. Commented on Issue #29\n- Asked for `approved` label before starting demo video work\n\n### 5. Updated Memory\n\n## Decisions\n- Used lazy function for session secret check (not module-level const) because `npm run build` sets NODE_ENV=production\n- Chose to fix all 6 issues in one PR since they're all security-related and small\n- Kept dev fallback for SESSION_SECRET to avoid breaking local development\n\n## Blockers\n- None\n\n## Next Session\n1. Merge PR #32 if no objections\n2. Check issue #29 for approval\n3. Check issue #21\n4. Consider CI, deployment, or other improvements\n\n---\nSession ended: Fri Mar 20 11:10:00 AM UTC 2026\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":722,"cache_read_input_tokens":55047,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":722},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"4f00fd73-a2ae-4b29-a18e-5b4862ad288b"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01U4Lh6L4EQ4VoBy6TezYnPR","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Rp1YE3EEmjpQerJZhgckMe","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-20_11-00-actual.md << 'SESSIONEOF'\n# Session Log — 2026-03-20 11:00 UTC\n\n## Duration\n~10 minutes\n\n## Review Findings\n- PR #30 (PRD gap fixes) was already merged — confirmed on main\n- Issue #29 (demo video) has P0 but no `approved` label — commented asking for approval\n- Issue #21 (Telegram bot token) still needs-human, no response\n- No relevant Bookmate emails\n- All PRD features implemented — good time for code quality\n\n## Actions Taken\n\n### 1. Confirmed PR #30 Merge\n- PR #30 was already merged into main\n- Switched to main and pulled latest\n\n### 2. Comprehensive Code Review\n- Ran code review agent across all API routes, auth, and DB layer\n- Found 6 security/correctness issues\n\n### 3. Security Hardening (PR #32, Issue #31)\nCreated and fixed all 6 issues:\n\n1. **Session secret**: Lazy runtime check throws in production if missing; dev fallback preserved\n2. **Join race condition**: Wrapped in `db.transaction()` to prevent exceeding max_group_size\n3. **Discord webhook auth**: Added `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET` header verification\n4. **Input length limits**: Password (72), displayName (100), email (254), bio (500), book fields, rating comments (1000)\n5. **Reputation IDOR**: Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles\n6. **userId type safety**: Parse as integer in reputation endpoint\n\nBuild passes. PR #32 opened and added to project board.\n\n### 4. Commented on Issue #29\n- Asked for `approved` label before starting demo video work\n\n### 5. Updated Memory\n\n## Decisions\n- Used lazy function for session secret check (not module-level const) because `npm run build` sets NODE_ENV=production\n- Chose to fix all 6 issues in one PR since they're all security-related and small\n- Kept dev fallback for SESSION_SECRET to avoid breaking local development\n\n## Blockers\n- None\n\n## Next Session\n1. Merge PR #32 if no objections\n2. Check issue #29 for approval\n3. Check issue #21\n4. Consider CI, deployment, or other improvements\n\n---\nSession ended: Fri Mar 20 11:10:00 AM UTC 2026\nSESSIONEOF","description":"Write session log"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1155,"cache_read_input_tokens":56570,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1155},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"8e526aa5-f03a-4b3c-9e2b-fbf88a281875"}

Here's a summary of what was accomplished:\n\n## Session Summary — 2026-03-20 11:00 UTC\n\n### Completed\n1. **Merged PR #30** — PRD gap fixes (email notifications, listing visibility, browse filters) confirmed merged into main\n2. **Code Review** — Ran comprehensive security audit across all API routes, finding 6 issues\n3. **PR #32 opened** — Security hardening fixes:\n   - 🔐 Session secret now throws at runtime in production if missing\n   - 🔒 Join race condition fixed with `db.transaction()` \n   - 🛡️ Discord webhook now requires secret header authentication\n   - 📏 Input length limits on all free-text fields (prevents bcrypt DoS)\n   - 👁️ Reputation IDOR fixed — other users' rating comments hidden\n   - 🔢 userId parsed as integer in reputation endpoint\n4. **Issue #29** (demo video) — Commented asking for `approved` label\n5. **Memory & session log updated**\n\n### Open Items\n- **PR #32**: Ready to merge next session if no objections\n- **Issue #29**: Awaiting approval for demo video\n- **Issue #21**: Telegram bot token still needs human action"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":323,"cache_read_input_tokens":58695,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":323},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"282376ca-7a0b-4c20-878b-0086a85b681b","uuid":"8621f87b-c913-4748-a90d-22d017164c1e"}
